roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT FOR CONTINUANCE OF REVOCATION HRG,DECL FILED

/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:10-09-07/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:6 MONTHS/ADDL CTS:23/X:COURT RECOMMENDS DEFENDANT SERVE SENTENCE IN SISTER PROGRAM,/X:IF DEFENDANT IS ACCEPTED IN JELANI HOUSE, COURT WILL BE OPEN TO AREQUEST TO HAVE DEFENDANT ENTER JELANI HOUSE,  COURT WILL MODIFY HER SENTENCE TO REFLECT 1 YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL,  IF SHE FAILS THE PROGRAM, SHE WILL SERVE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL,/PROB EXT:09-29-10/

/CAL: PHC ON DA MTR,TRLG 10015401/CONTD: 06-21-10, M12, SUPP REPT ON MTR/DOP/
/CAL: PTC ON DA MTR/CONTD: 06-08-10, S23, PHC ON DA MTR, TRAILING 10015401/DOP/

/CAL:FILING OF APD MTR/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE APD/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR/
